title: RM02 runner skeleton repair
objective:
Create dir governance/runners
Create file governance/runners/__init__.py with content """Governance runner utilities."""
Create file governance/runners/runner_skeleton.py with content import json
from pathlib import Path

REQUIRED_FILES = [
    'governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md',
    'governance/state/RM01_RESTORE_GOVERNANCE_VALIDATION_CONTRACT.json',
]

def collect_status():
    missing = [path for path in REQUIRED_FILES if not Path(path).exists()]
    return {
        'status': 'pass' if not missing else 'fail',
        'missing': missing,
        'release_pass': False,
        'note': 'Runner skeleton is deterministic and fail-closed.'
    }

def main():
    result = collect_status()
    print(json.dumps(result, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
    if result['missing']:
        raise SystemExit(1)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
Create file governance/validation/validate_runner_skeleton.py with content import json
import subprocess
import sys


def main():
    completed = subprocess.run([sys.executable, 'governance/runners/runner_skeleton.py'], check=False, capture_output=True, text=True)
    print(completed.stdout)
    if completed.returncode != 0:
        print(completed.stderr)
        raise SystemExit(completed.returncode)
    data = json.loads(completed.stdout)
    if data.get('status') != 'pass':
        raise SystemExit(1)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
